bead.title: ADR-022 step 4: deprecate --local flag (no-op + warning); doc + test sweep
bead.description: Make --local a no-op with deprecation warning. Update CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, getting-started, cobra help. Sweep tests: cli/cmd/work_test.go, agent_execute_loop_test.go, zero_config_work_test.go. Sweep skills: skills/ddx/reference/work.md and embedded copies. ~150 LOC + doc edits.
bead.acceptance: 1. --local flag parsed but ignored; deprecation warning printed to stderr on first use. 2. Help text reflects deprecation. 3. CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, website/content/docs/getting-started.md updated. 4. Skills under skills/ddx/reference/work.md + embedded copies updated. 5. Tests asserting --local-specific behavior rewritten or deleted. 6. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green; lefthook pre-commit passes.
